events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: trench protection, sloping wrong for soil type, actively in progress. This is a serious safety hazard. Sloping/benching not matching soil type violates OSHA 1926 Subpart P. This is a critical risk - cave-in hazard. Decision: fail. Component conditions: non-compliant, installed-defective. Need immediate controls: stop work, evacuate trench, correct sloping/benching per tabulated data for soil type, or use protective system (trench box/shoring).
